content: Add database schema for interview management (resumes_session_id, root_session_id, status, audit table)
Create FastAPI endpoints for interview management (resume, delete, edit transcript)
Build interview management UI page with history table and actions
Implement transcript editing functionality with audit trail
Add analysis review workflow for regenerating system prompts
Design off-the-record chat mode for agent probing
Create chat API endpoints separate from interview system
Build chat UI for real-time persona conversation
Ensure clear distinction between formal interviews and informal chats
